title: Python shipped module executable source retirement

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to the promoted TODO item and its stated touched paths.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Shipped module source trees, including the root module, no longer own executable CLI front doors, parser/help construction, command dispatch/fallback envelopes, generated-command runtime dispatch, or generic deterministic file/data/schema/template/output primitive execution, and this cannot be satisfied by relocating product-specific executable behavior into command-generation source.
proof_expectations: Generated package static proof scans tracked shipped module source roots for retired CLI parser/dispatch/runtime markers.
Focused regression tests prove the gate rejects shipped-source CLI backslides and accepts the current source tree.
completion_criteria: Static proof rejects full completion while shipped module source trees regain executable CLI parser/dispatch/runtime markers.
Current tracked shipped module source roots pass the retirement scan.
Remaining generated runtime/executor provenance debt is routed to python-product-runtime-source-generation.

non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

execution_run.what happened: Added tracked-source static proof for shipped module executable CLI retirement and regression tests for current state plus backslide detection.
execution_run.validations run: uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run pytest tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py -q; uv run ruff check scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py tests/test_generated_command_package_proof_runner.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success; uv run agentic-workspace summary --target . --format json; rg "_runtime_cli|generated_cli_package\.py|operation_ir_executor|run_operation_ir|_GENERATED_RUNTIME_HANDLERS" src packages -g "*.py"
execution_run.result for continuation: Source-retirement gate is complete; continue with generated runtime/executor provenance in python-product-runtime-source-generation.

delegation_outcome_feedback.expected savings: Use a sidecar audit to inventory remaining executable markers and stale imports while the main thread prepares proof gates and implementation.

delegation_outcome_feedback.proof result: Sidecar returned findings consistent with local proof; no delegated edits.
delegation_outcome_feedback.quality concern: Completion must not be claimed from file names, generated placement, or relocated runtime code; proof must preserve #892 intent.
delegation_outcome_feedback.decomposition adjustment: Continue with python-product-runtime-source-generation and primitive executor migration after this source-retirement gate is proven.

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Current shipped module roots have no retired CLI executable markers and the checker rejects a simulated backslide; #892 continuation remains routed separately.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
closure_check.why this decision is honest: The source-retirement guard is complete, but generated runtime/executor files are still not rendered by command-generation and full #892 remains open.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: check_generated_command_packages.py source-retirement scan, focused tests, and stale-reference sweep showing no retired module source runtime imports beyond generated loader/test/reporting references.
closure_check.reopen trigger: A shipped module source file regains CLI parser/dispatch/runtime markers or full completion is claimed before generated runtime provenance is resolved.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.

continuation: Continue #892 with python-product-runtime-source-generation; six generated/python runtime/executor files are imported/packaged but not rendered.
